book_summary: 1 John 1-5 has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. The book preserves embodied witness, fellowship/participation, Divine as light, confession and cleansing, remaining in Messiah, sibling-love, anointing, anti-deception discernment, God/Divine is love, perfect love casting out fear, Spirit-water-blood witness, and guarding from idols.
translation_notes: Meno/remain/abide is central across the book.
Antichrist language is rendered opposing-Messiah and must not be used for paranoia or target-mapping.
Kosmos is world-system where context indicates disordered desire-system, not creation itself.
Divine is love governs discernment language.
Perfect love casts out fear is a major pastoral safeguard.
Comma Johanneum is excluded from 1 John 5:7-8 first-pass restored text; shorter Greek witness followed.
source_witness_audit_flags: 1 John 5:7-8 Comma Johanneum variant requires source witness metadata.
1 John 2 and 4 opposing-Messiah language requires reception-history and anti-paranoia safeguards.
next_actions: Continue Batch C with 2 John, 3 John, and Jude.
